name: Pat's Shrimp Creole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Coarsely chopped Green or Red bell pepper
60 Large fresh shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 6 tablespoons butter in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion, celery, and bell pepper; sauté for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in tomato puree, tomatoes, bay leaves, oregano, thyme, and Creole seafood seasoning to taste. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Stir in seafood stock and bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer until the sauce begins to thicken, about 45 minutes.
6. Remove from heat; strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve and discard the vegetables.
7. Melt remaining butter in a large sauté pan over medium heat.
8. Add onion and brown sugar; sauté until golden brown.
9. Stir in celery and bell pepper; sauté for an additional 3 to 4 minutes.
10. Reduce heat, stir in reserved sauce, and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
11. Gently add shrimp and cook just until heated through.
12. Serve immediately over rice or jambalaya.
